{{Short description|Italian film festival in 2021}} {{Use British English|date=July 2021}} {{Use dmy dates|date=July 2021}} {{Infobox Film festival | name = 78th Venice International Film Festival | image = File:78th Venice Film Festival poster.jpg | caption = Official festival poster by [[Lorenzo Mattotti]]. | opening = ''[[Parallel Mothers]]'' | closing = ''[[The Hidden Child (film)|The Hidden Child]]'' | location = [[Venice]], [[Italy]] | founded = 1932 | awards = [[Golden Lion]]:
''[[Happening (film)|Happening]]'' | host = [[Serena Rossi]] |artistic_director= [[Alberto Barbera]] | number = | date = 1 – 11 September 2021 | website = {{URL|https://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/2021}} | chronology = Venice Film Festival | preceded_by = [[77th Venice International Film Festival|77th]] | followed_by = [[79th Venice International Film Festival|79th]] }} The '''78th annual [[Venice Film Festival|Venice International Film Festival]]''' was held from 1 to 11 September 2021, at [[Venice Lido]] in [[Italy]].{{cite web|url=https://www.labiennale.org/en/news/director-bong-joon-ho-president-venezia-78-international-jury|title=Director Bong Joon Ho President of the Venezia 78 International Jury|date=15 January 2021|access-date=15 January 2021}} This edition marked the festival's return to its full format following the [[COVID-19 pandemic in Italy|COVID-19]] epidemic during the prior year. South Korean director [[Bong Joon-ho]] was the Jury President of the main competition, marking the first time a South Korean director has been picked as the festival's top juror.{{cite web|first=Nick|last=Vivarelli|url=https://variety.com/2021/film/news/venice-bong-joon-ho-jury-president-1234886201/|title='Parasite' Director Bong Joon Ho to Head Jury at Venice Film Festival|work=[[Variety (magazine)|Variety]]|date=15 January 2021|access-date=15 January 2021}}{{cite web|first=Andreas |last=Wiseman|url=https://deadline.com/2021/01/venice-film-festival-parasite-director-bong-joon-ho-set-as-jury-president-1234674553/|title=Venice Film Festival: 'Parasite' Director Bong Joon Ho Set As 2021 Jury President|work=[[Deadline Hollywood|Deadline]]|date=15 January 2021|access-date=15 January 2021}} [[Serena Rossi]] hosted the opening and closing nights.{{cite web |title=Biennale Cinema 2021 {{!}} Serena Rossi to host the opening and closing nights of Venezia 78 |url=https://www.labiennale.org/en/news/serena-rossi-host-opening-and-closing-nights-venezia-78 |website=La Biennale di Venezia |language=en |date=29 April 2021}} The [[Golden Lion]] was awarded to ''[[Happening (film)|Happening]]'' by [[Audrey Diwan]].{{Cite web|date=2021-09-11|title=French abortion drama 'Happening' wins Golden Lion at Venice Film Festival|url=https://www.france24.com/en/live-news/20210911-french-abortion-drama-happening-wins-golden-lion-at-venice-film-festival|access-date=2021-09-17|website=France 24|language=en}} The festival opened with ''[[Parallel Mothers]]'' by [[Pedro Almodóvar]], and closed with ''[[The Hidden Child (film)|The Hidden Child]]'' by [[Roberto Andò]]. ==Juries== === Main Competition (''Venezia 78'') === * [[Bong Joon-ho]], South Korean filmmaker - Jury President{{cite web|url=https://deadline.com/2021/07/venice-competition-jury-chloe-zhao-cynthia-erivo-sarah-gadon-bong-joon-ho-1234797219/|title=Venice Competition Jury: Chloé Zhao & Cynthia Erivo Join President Bong Joon Ho|date=21 July 2021|access-date=21 July 2021|language=en}} * [[Saverio Costanzo]], Italian filmmaker * [[Virginie Efira]], Belgian actress * [[Cynthia Erivo]], British actress and singer * [[Sarah Gadon]], Canadian actress * [[Alexander Nanau]], Romanian-German director * [[Chloé Zhao]], Chinese-American filmmaker === ''[[Orizzonti]]'' === * [[Jasmila Žbanić]], Bosnian filmmaker and producer - Jury President * [[Mona Fastvold]], Norwegian filmmaker and actress * [[Shahram Mokri]], Iranian filmmaker * Josh Siegel, director of the cinema department of [[MoMA]] * [[Nadia Terranova]], Italian novelist === ''Luigi De Laurentiis'' Award for a Debut Film === * [[Uberto Pasolini]], Italian director and producer - Jury President * Martin Schweighofer, Austrian film critic * [[Amalia Ulman]], Argentine visual artist === Venice VR Expanded === * [[Michelle Kranot]], Israeli filmmaker - Jury President * Maria Grazia Mattei, Italian art critic * [[Jonathan Yeo]], British artist ==Official Sections== ===In Competition=== The following films were selected for the main competition:{{cite web|url=https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/movies/movie-news/venice-2021-film-festival-lineup-1234987376/|title=Venice Film Festival 2021 Full Lineup|last=Roxborough|first=Scott|work=[[The Hollywood Reporter]]|date=26 July 2021|accessdate=26 July 2021}} {| class="wikitable" style="width:95%; margin-bottom:2px" |- ! web|url=https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/movies/movie-news/2021-venice-film-festival-winners-1235011876/ |title=French Abortion Drama 'Happening' Wins Venice Film Festival |work=The Hollywood
